creator: joel@tahoestores.com
text:
The maia project is waiting for fixes addressed in 4.15.0.

Unfortunately the update seems to be waiting distribution.

Unfetchable as the pear channel no longer works.

It is scheduled to be removed on or after 2023-09-30.
